CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "audit_logs" (
  "id" serial PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  "adminId" integer,
  "acao" varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  "tabela" varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  "registroId" integer,
  "dadosAntes" jsonb,
  "dadosDepois" jsonb,
  "ip" varchar(45),
  "criadoEm" timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL
);

ALTER TABLE "clients" ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS "deletedAt" timestamp;
ALTER TABLE "rentals" ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS "deletedAt" timestamp;
